result.stdout:
Description:
  An extensible software visualization tool

Usage:
  helveg <SOURCE> [options]

Arguments:
  <SOURCE>  Path to a project or a solution. [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-helveg-0.14.4-8881249c8b6d4280ba9a2abe52c61d72]

Options:
  --preset <Dev|Docs>                                                    Preset of default values for the other options. [default: Dev]
  --compare-to <compare-to>                                              The target project or solution for comparison.
  -pa, --project-analysis <All|Explicit|None|PublicApi|WithoutSymbols>   Scope of the internal project analysis.
  -ea, --external-analysis <All|Explicit|None|PublicApi|WithoutSymbols>  Scope of the analysis of external dependencies.
  -m, --mode <DataOnly|None|SingleFile|StaticApp>                        UI mode to use.
  --dry-run                                                              Don't output anything. Equivalent to --mode None.
  -n, --name <name>                                                      Name of the resulting data set / visualization. Defaults to the SOURCE file name.
  --out-dir <out-dir>                                                    Output directory. [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-helveg-0.14.4-8881249c8b6d4280ba9a2abe52c61d72]
  --out-file <out-file>                                                  Output file. Applies to SingleFile and DataOnly modes.
  -p, --properties <properties>                                          Set an MSBuild property for the loading of projects
  -f, --force                                                            Overwrite previous results.
  --initial-depth <initial-depth>                                        Initial expanded depth of the diagram.
  --initial-relation <initial-relation>                                  Initial selected relations of the diagram.
  --initial-kind <initial-kind>                                          Initial selected kinds of the diagram.
  -v, --verbose                                                          Set logging level to Debug.
  --version                                                              Print Helveg's version.
  -?, -h, --help                                                         Show help and usage information
